summary: Tested critical bug fixes for Labour Profit and Unmapped Items. All 21 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verification PASSED. Labour profit now shows ₹38.84L (positive) instead of -₹1.05L. Individual items have non-zero labor values. '136' is NOT appearing in unmapped items.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Labour profit calculation now uses total_amount field as primary source for sale labour
✓ Purchase labour cost sourced from purchase_ledger (labour_per_kg / 1000)
✓ sales-summary endpoint correctly sums total_amount for labor (line 3109)
✓ unmapped endpoint filters test data patterns (line 2812)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) Labour profit calculation now uses total_amount field from sales transactions, not the labor field which was 0. Purchase cost from purchase_ledger.labour_per_kg. Total labour profit is now ₹38.84L (positive). (2) Unmapped items endpoint filters purely numeric names with isdigit() and test patterns. 233 unmapped items remain but no '136'.

Labour Profit Bug.Previous Issue: Labour profit showing -₹1.05L (negative) and all items showing ₹0 for labour
Labour Profit Bug.Fix Applied: Profit calculation now uses total_amount field (which stores labour Rs per line in silver trading)

Unmapped Items Bug.Previous Issue: '136' appearing in unmapped items despite being purely numeric
Unmapped Items Bug.Fix Applied: Added isdigit() filter in get_unmapped_items() endpoint
Unmapped Items Bug.Result: '136' NOT in unmapped list, no purely numeric items present

Sales Summary Bug.Previous Issue: total_labor was zero in sales summary
Sales Summary Bug.Fix Applied: Now uses (t.get('total_amount', 0) or t.get('labor', 0)) for labor calculation

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/analytics/customer-profit - 200 OK, customers have labour_profit_inr values
GET /api/analytics/supplier-profit - 200 OK, suppliers have labor_profit_inr values
GET /api/mappings/unmapped - 200 OK, no purely numeric items, '136' NOT present

ProfitAnalysis.jsx.Total Sales Card: PASSED - Shows Net 538.233 kg, Fine 342.764 kg, Labour ₹62.26L
ProfitAnalysis.jsx.Most Profitable Items Table: PASSED - Items have non-zero Labour values (₹1.42L, ₹11.74K, etc.)

ItemMapping.jsx.No '136' visible: PASSED - First items are 'AARTA THAL B1 GOLDEN', 'AB JUDA -008', etc.
ItemMapping.jsx.No numeric items visible: PASSED - All visible items are valid product names
